The '''''Mediator''''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Mediator-class battle cruiser|''Mediator''-class battle cruiser]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. It was commissioned shortly before or during [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].

==History==
The first of the ''Mediator''-class battle cruisers, the ''Mediator'' was sent under the command of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Ackdool]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] to oversee the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] mediation of the dispute between [[Rhommamool/Legends|Rhommamool]] and [[Osarian]].<ref name="Vector Prime" />

[[Nom Anor]] was able to damage the ''Mediator'' after being offered sanctuary for a diplomatic meeting by Ackdool. The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] operative used a concealed [[A-wing]] to escape from the two stage liquid fuelled rocket that was bringing him to the battle cruiser. Nom Anor then remotely detonated the nuclear fission devices packed in his spacecraft as this was entering into the ''Mediator''{{'s}} lower docking bay. The explosion vaporized the entire section of docking bays, blowing out a huge section of the lower floor of the ship. Still, the vessel was not completely destroyed and managed to get its spin under control, a testament to Mon Calamari engineering.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''
